topic: 淘气的小猫学会了收拾玩具
script:
小猫咪咪最爱玩，积木、球、玩偶全都翻出来，客厅像小山坡。妈妈喊：“该睡觉啦！”咪咪一转身，差点被小车绊倒，“哎呀！”尾巴都竖起来了。

咪咪不服气：“我明天还要玩嘛！”这时，小老鼠嘟嘟从洞里探头：“我来帮你！收拾玩具就像玩游戏——找家回家！”嘟嘟拍手：“积木回方盒，球回篮子，玩偶回床边。”

咪咪开始比赛：“一、二、三！”啪嗒啪嗒，玩具一个个跳进“家”。可最大的恐龙怎么也塞不进盒子，咪咪急得喵喵叫。妈妈递来一个大袋子：“恐龙住这里。”咪咪把恐龙抱进去，呼——成功！

客厅亮堂堂，咪咪躺下说：“收拾完更好玩，明天找玩具也更快！”妈妈亲亲它的额头：“淘气也能变能干。”

pages.text: 《淘气的小猫学会了收拾玩具》
pages.prompt:
儿童绘本封面，主题：淘气的小猫学会了收拾玩具
画面比例 3:4
固定使用已保存角色资产作为视觉锚点。角色设定：小白兔豆豆：幼年小白兔（约4–6岁），体型小巧圆润，通体雪白的软毛，脸颊略带淡粉色；一对长耳朵竖起，耳尖微微向外张，内侧是浅粉色；黑亮的大眼睛，紧张时眼睛睁得更圆，开心时眉眼弯弯；小鼻头粉色，嘴巴小巧。背着一只明亮的小黄包（小尺寸、斜挎或双肩皆可表现为儿童款），背带贴合身体；整体穿着偏童趣，可搭配简洁的浅色T恤或背带短裤（不抢小黄包的视觉重点）。动作特点是爱蹦蹦跳、跑跑跳跳；情绪表情变化明显：兴奋时笑容大、眼睛发亮；被吓到时耳朵后缩、身体缩成一团、躲在树后探头；迷路时眼神慌张、心跳紧张但仍努力镇定举包自报姓名。；所有页面保持同一发型、服装和脸型。
Style: Hand-painted watercolor children's picture book illustration. Texture: Visible paper fiber, mild pigment granulation, subtle brush pressure variation, slight edge bleed, natural stroke jitter. Palette: Soft warm palette with restrained saturation and low digital gloss.
构图变化标识：第 1 幅；封面主视觉
优先真实手绘感，避免过度锐化与数字涂抹感。
Avoid AI-looking artifacts: over-smooth surfaces, plastic skin, repeated micro-patterns, duplicated objects, warped fingers, fused edges, random gibberish text, logo, watermark. Prefer natural imperfections and human-made variation: tiny asymmetry, uneven pigment density, non-uniform outlines, realistic shadow falloff.

pages.prompt:
Wide shot, messy living room filled with toys like small hills (blocks, ball, dolls, toy car). DouDou, a young small chubby white rabbit (4-6 years old), soft snow-white fur with light pink cheeks, long upright ears with pale pink inner ears, big shiny black eyes, small pink nose, wearing a simple light T-shirt/short overalls and a bright small yellow backpack. He hops excitedly on the toy pile, joyful expression, eyes sparkling. 4k, cinematic lighting, warm evening indoor light, masterpiece, shallow depth of field, smooth pan, child-friendly picture book style

Slow pull-back, 4k, cinematic lighting, masterpiece, clean composition

qualityGate.summary: 发布包未通过基础质量门禁，建议补图或重跑失败页。

shots.description: 【客厅/傍晚】满地玩具堆成小山坡：积木、球、玩偶、小车到处都是。小白兔豆豆背着小黄包在玩具堆里蹦蹦跳跳，笑得眼睛发亮。
shots.cameraMovement: 轻微俯拍，缓慢平移展示凌乱客厅
shots.videoPrompt: Wide shot, messy living room filled with toys like small hills (blocks, ball, dolls, toy car). DouDou, a young small chubby white rabbit (4-6 years old), soft snow-white fur with light pink cheeks, long upright ears with pale pink inner ears, big shiny black eyes, small pink nose, wearing a simple light T-shirt/short overalls and a bright small yellow backpack. He hops excitedly on the toy pile, joyful expression, eyes sparkling. 4k, cinematic lighting, warm evening indoor light, masterpiece, shallow depth of field, smooth pan, child-friendly picture book style

shots.description: 【同场】画外音传来兔妈妈的呼唤：“该睡觉啦！”豆豆回头一愣，耳朵微微一抖，表情从兴奋转为不情愿。
shots.cameraMovement: 从豆豆侧后方缓慢推近到半身
shots.videoPrompt: Medium shot from behind/side of DouDou in the toy-strewn living room. Off-screen mother rabbit calls, 'Time for bed!' DouDou turns his head, ears twitch, expression shifts from excited to reluctant. 4k, cinematic lighting, warm indoor ambience, gentle push-in, soft focus background, picture book illustration feel

shots.description: 【同场】豆豆转身要跑，脚尖差点被地上的小车绊住，身体猛地前倾，“哎呀！”耳朵后缩、尾巴一抖，整只兔子缩成一团。
shots.cameraMovement: 低角度仰拍，快速小幅跟随+轻微抖动表现惊吓
shots.videoPrompt: Medium shot, low-angle. DouDou nearly trips over a toy car, lurches forward, startled 'Aiya!' Ears fold back, body scrunches, frightened pose. Dynamic handheld micro-shake, motion blur subtle, 4k, cinematic lighting, family living room, masterpiece

shots.description: 【同场】豆豆站稳后抱着小黄包不服气地嘟嘴：“我明天还要玩嘛！”眼睛睁得圆圆的，脚还不自觉地跺一下。
shots.videoPrompt: Close-up on DouDou's face and upper body, pouting and protesting, 'I still want to play tomorrow!' Big glossy black eyes wide, pink cheeks, small pink nose, yellow backpack strap visible. Slow push-in, shallow depth of field, warm indoor lighting, 4k, cinematic, masterpiece

shots.description: 【墙角/洞口】小老鼠嘟嘟从洞里探头，朝豆豆招手：“我来帮你！收拾玩具就像玩游戏——找家回家！”豆豆惊喜地歪头看它。
shots.cameraMovement: 平移到洞口并停住，保持稳定构图
shots.videoPrompt: Medium shot near a wall corner mouse hole. A tiny mouse pops out, waving, saying 'I will help! Cleaning is like a game—find their home!' DouDou turns toward the mouse with curious surprise, ears perk up. 4k, cinematic lighting, cozy indoor, smooth lateral pan, picture book style, masterpiece

shots.description: 【同场】小老鼠嘟嘟拍手示范：“积木回方盒，球回篮子，玩偶回床边。”豆豆点点头，双手摆出“开始比赛”的姿势。
shots.cameraMovement: 轻微推近，镜头在豆豆与嘟嘟之间小幅摇摄
shots.videoPrompt: Medium shot, mouse claps and points: blocks to the square box, ball to the basket, doll to the bedside. DouDou nods, raises hands like starting a race, yellow backpack visible. Subtle push-in with gentle pan between characters, 4k, cinematic lighting, warm cozy atmosphere, masterpiece

shots.description: 【客厅/收拾开始】豆豆大声倒数：“一、二、三！”然后蹦跳着把积木一块块丢进方盒，啪嗒啪嗒像在闯关。
shots.cameraMovement: 跟随平移+轻微推近，保持豆豆在画面中心
shots.videoPrompt: Wide shot, action sequence. DouDou counts '1, 2, 3!' then hops quickly, tossing colorful blocks into a square box, rhythmic 'pat-a pat-a'. Keep DouDou centered, tracking pan with slight push-in. 4k, cinematic lighting, bright cheerful indoor, masterpiece, smooth motion

shots.description: 【同场】豆豆把球抱起，轻轻一抛，球“咚”一声落进篮子。豆豆得意地笑，眉眼弯弯。
shots.cameraMovement: 轻微慢动作感的推近，跟随球的抛物线小幅上摇
shots.videoPrompt: Medium shot. DouDou lifts a ball and tosses it into a basket; the ball lands with a soft thunk. DouDou smiles proudly, eyes crescent-shaped, ears upright. Slight slow-motion feel, gentle push-in, small tilt up following the arc. 4k, cinematic lighting, masterpiece, shallow depth of field

shots.description: 【同场】豆豆把玩偶抱到床边排好，像给它们盖被子一样整理。动作认真，嘴角带笑。
shots.cameraMovement: 稳定定镜，略微俯拍突出摆放动作
shots.videoPrompt: Medium shot with slight top-down angle. DouDou gently places dolls by the bedside, arranging them neatly like tucking them in. Focus on careful hands and tender expression; yellow backpack remains on. 4k, cinematic lighting, cozy home, masterpiece, static camera, soft bokeh

shots.description: 【同场/困难出现】最大的恐龙玩具太大，豆豆怎么塞也塞不进盒子。豆豆急得跺脚，耳朵向后缩，喵…不，是“呜呜”般的委屈叫声。
shots.cameraMovement: 快速推近到豆豆焦急表情，再轻微下摇到恐龙卡住的盒口
shots.videoPrompt: Close-up sequence. DouDou struggles to fit a large dinosaur toy into a small box; it gets stuck. DouDou looks anxious, ears pulled back, stomps lightly, making a frustrated whimper. Quick push-in to facial expression then tilt down to the stuck toy. 4k, cinematic lighting, masterpiece, shallow depth of field

shots.description: 【同场】兔妈妈走来递上一个大袋子：“恐龙住这里。”豆豆眼睛一亮，立刻把恐龙抱进袋子里，“呼——成功！”
shots.cameraMovement: 从妈妈手中袋子入镜，平移到豆豆把恐龙放入袋子的动作
shots.videoPrompt: Medium shot. Mother rabbit enters frame handing a big bag, saying 'The dinosaur lives here.' DouDou's face brightens; he hugs the dinosaur toy and places it into the bag, exhaling in relief 'Phew—success!' Smooth pan from the bag to DouDou's action. 4k, cinematic lighting, warm family tone, masterpiece

shots.description: 【客厅/收拾完成】客厅变得亮堂整洁。豆豆坐在干净地毯上抱着小黄包，开心总结：“收拾完更好玩，明天找玩具也更快！”
shots.cameraMovement: 缓慢拉远展示整洁空间，豆豆居中
shots.videoPrompt: Wide shot of a tidy, bright living room; toys neatly stored (blocks in box, ball in basket, dolls by bedside, dinosaur in bag). DouDou sits on a clean rug holding his bright yellow backpack, smiling and speaking: 'Cleaning makes it more fun, and faster to find toys tomorrow!' Slow pull-back, 4k, cinematic lighting, masterpiece, clean composition

shots.description: 【结尾/温馨】兔妈妈俯身亲亲豆豆的额头：“淘气也能变能干。”豆豆闭眼笑，耳朵放松竖起。
shots.cameraMovement: 缓慢推近，停在亲吻瞬间
shots.videoPrompt: Close-up, warm ending. Mother rabbit kisses DouDou's forehead, saying 'Even naughty kids can become capable.' DouDou closes eyes and smiles softly; ears relaxed upright, pink cheeks visible, yellow backpack strap in frame. Slow push-in and hold on the kiss moment. 4k, cinematic lighting, soft warm glow, masterpiece, shallow depth of field
